title: 5 Pcs Storage Baskets, Cotton Rope Woven Baskets Storage Bins, Bathroom Basket for Toiletries with Handle, Toy Basket Storage Small, Fabric Storage Boxes Organizer for Shelves (White)
features: Storage Basket Set of 5: Decorative rope storage basket set has five different sizes of storage baskets, each basket with handle design, can be used for organizing fruits, remote controls, cosmetics, towels, diapers, blankets, toys, etc. according to your diverse storage needs

High Quality Cotton Storage Baskets: The woven storage baskets is handmade from high quality cotton cord and non-woven fabric, soft to touch, sturdy and durable, without any sharp edges, you can rest assured that it will last for a long time, ideal for organizing your room, tidying up your desk or bathroom storage

Sturdy Storage Baskets: The bathroom baskets for toiletries is reinforced with handle and base, so there is no problem of being flattened during transportation or being loose and fail to stand up when in use, it can be a perfect accent to any decoration

Multi-functional Storage Baskets: The cotton rope woven baskets storage can effectively manage daily necessities and can provide plenty of space, making them an ideal storage solution for living rooms, bedrooms, bathrooms, and nurseries. Cotton storage baskets can be cleaned by simply wiping with a damp cloth and hand washing in cold water if necessary

Widely Use: Our fabric storage boxes organizer are suitable for storing household items, handicrafts, clothes, bathroom supplies, remote controls, fruits, toys, etc., perfect for bathroom storage bins, changing table organizers, toy baskets or living room desktop storage baskets, and also a great gift choice
description: Multi-functional cotton rope storage baskets, including five different sizes of storage baskets, can meet all your storage needs. Widely used in living room, bathroom, bedroom, office and dresser etc. Quantity: 5 storage baskets in different sizes Size: 7.9*5.5*2.8inch 9.1*6.3*3.1inch 10.2*7.1*3.5ich 11*7.9*3.9inch 11.8*8.7*4.3inch Colors: Warm White/Warm White & Brown Material: Cotton thread & non-woven fabric How to Clean: Just wipe it with a damp cloth and wash it with cold water if necessary Applicable range: Great gift for any occasion, also can be used as an organizer basket for bookshelf, bedroom desktop, bathroom, pantry and kitchen, closet and so on
